body_preview: - The Day 114 12:45 session received a pre-seeded task (`task_01.md`) that was already completed in Day 114 08:48. The trajectory records `task_obsolete_count=1` and `obsolete_already_satisfied=1` for that session. - The assessment's Recent Changes section says: "**Analysis-only task pressure made landable** (`scripts/preseed_session_plan.py`): The `task_no_
expected_evidence: Future task manifests show `contradiction_reason` for seeds already completed in prior sessions. `task_manifest_seed_contradiction_count` drops to 0 when the assessment clearly describes prior-session completion. `task_obsolete_count` drops to 0 when no other cause exists. title: Fix stale seed contradiction detection missing completed work in Recent Changes
